summary: Black-and-white photo montage set to music with no speech: workers on a factory assembly line, a machinist inside a large industrial turbine, a smiling woman in a welder's mask, an ironworker in a Bethlehem Steel hard hat on cables, and a woman in a hard hat and reflective vest by a large haul-truck tire. A serif title 'CELEBRATING 250 YEARS OF THE AMERICAN WORKER' appears, with a Betsy Ross flag and 'dol.gov/Freedom250' in the lower third throughout.

script.scene: Factory floor: rows of capped men assembling parts on a line; title overlay 'CELEBRATING 250 YEARS OF THE AMERICAN WORKER'; Betsy Ross flag and 'dol.gov/Freedom250' at bottom.
A machinist crouched inside the curved interior of a large industrial turbine, hammer in hand; flag and URL lower-third persist.
Portrait of a smiling young Black woman in a welder's flip-up mask and heavy gloves; 'dol.gov/Freedom250' below.
An ironworker in a 'BETHLEHEM' steel hard hat leaning among thick cables on a construction beam, looking to camera.
A woman in a hard hat, safety glasses and reflective vest standing before a large haul-truck tire; flag and URL held.

notable_text: CELEBRATING 250 YEARS OF THE AMERICAN WORKER
As America turns 250, we're honoring the workers who built our nation.
